description_for_human: Reads and writes Launch Control records, calls business skills, and runs lc_CalculateLaunchReadiness via the Dataverse MCP server.
description_for_model: Use this Model Context Protocol server to reach Microsoft Dataverse for the Launch Control environment. All record reads, record writes, business skills, knowledge grounding, and the lc_CalculateLaunchReadiness custom API are exposed as MCP tools and resources.
